text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 83 

HCBS_MENTL_ILL_CC_IND 

LABEL: HCBS Mental Illness State-Reported Chronic Condition Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary had the Home and Community Based Services (HCBS) Non-
health home Chronic Condition Mental Illness and/or Serious Emotional Disturbance; most recent in 
the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME:
